companyNameJapanese: 富士フイルムホールディングス株式会社
description: Diversified company with major semiconductor materials division. Supplies photoresist, CMP slurry (world #1 in copper CMP), process chemicals. Target 5T JPY semiconductor sales by 2030.

_externalRelationships.notes: World #1 in copper CMP slurry. PFAS-free ArF resist developed 2025. 'Ultimate customer service' for TSMC.
